---
title: "Charming night in Xiamen"
subtitle: "It is too woderful to be not real……"
author: "Guozheng Huang"
date: "2023-09-26"
categories: [blog]
toc: true
image: "image.jpg"
---

It is a night of unparalleled enchantment.

It must be a fate or a density. I was trapped in guilt over Fantuan. I always think I couldn't give back the gift to her and cost her enthusiasm and kindness in the meanwhile.

In the Tencent Meeting, she introduced some people in Xibu village. She didn't mention me tonight, which let me feel down, pity and depress. I don't blame to her, I should pay for her.

Walking with Maofu on the stree in Xiamen Island, which can reduce a few depression. Much to my relief, I can encounter Maofu, Xiaozhuang and Xiaoyang here. I like them sincerely--a feeling of deep and faithful attachment. Heishiyu has given me more gifts than I can return: about them, about the specific memories belong to us.

Xiaojian invited Maofu to have late-night supper, I accompanyed him. On the way to the bar, We had a photo.

![With Maofu \| 25 September, 2023](img/with-maofu.jpg)
